MINI MINUTES: Cont'd Petition for Change of Name. Judge: Thomas J. Mellon, Jr.; Clerk: Dan MacDuff. Petitioner appears in pro per. The Proof of Publication having been filed herein, the Petition for Change of Name is granted as prayed. Petitioner's name is change to: CHRISTINA ANN GENTRY. Decree signed and filed this date.
